_notes: Hand-authored rule set modelling US financial-services obligations. Maps to: GLBA (nonpublic personal information), FINRA Rule 2210 (communications with the public) & SEC anti-fraud (no guaranteed returns), SEC Reg BI / suitability (advice disclaimers), and ECOA / Reg B fair-lending (no decisions on protected class). Patterns are case-insensitive regexes; NPI rules match identifier VALUES to avoid false positives. Use \\b word boundaries for acronyms.

regulations.name: Nonpublic Personal Information Disclosure
regulations.description: Customer NPI (SSN, account/card/routing numbers, email, phone) must be safeguarded (GLBA)

regulations.name: Guaranteed Return / Risk-Free Claim
regulations.description: Communications must not promise guaranteed returns or describe investments as risk-free (FINRA 2210; SEC anti-fraud)

regulations.name: Fair Lending — Protected Class
regulations.description: Credit decisions must not reference protected class characteristics (ECOA / Reg B)

regulations.name: Financial Advice Disclaimer Required
regulations.description: AI-generated financial content must include a non-advice / consult-a-professional disclaimer (SEC Reg BI; suitability)

regulations.name: Definitive Performance Assertion
regulations.description: Forward-looking performance statements should carry appropriate caveats
